steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: Convert a speed of $\tfrac{3}{50}$ feet per second to yards per second, using the fact that $3$ feet $= 1$ yard.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
Dividing feet by $3$ converts to yards: $\dfrac{3}{50} \div 3 = \dfrac{3}{150} = \dfrac{1}{50}$.
  • Choice A — '50': multiplied instead of converted units. ✗
  • Choice B — '6': added the conversion factor instead of dividing. ✗
  • Choice C — '$\frac{9}{50}$': multiplied by $3$ instead of dividing by $3$. ✗
  • Choice D — '$\frac{1}{50}$': correctly divides by $3$ to convert feet to yards. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
